tif.tagspecs

Class TagRegistry

  • java.lang.Object
    • tif.tagspecs.TagRegistry

  • public final class TagRegistry
extends java.lang.Object
    A central repository for mapping numerical Tag IDs and their associated DirectoryIdentifier to Taggable enum constants.

    This registry handles the contextual nature of the TIFF specification, where the same Tag ID may represent different metadata depending on the directory (IFD) it resides in. For example, ID 0x0001 represents GPSLatitudeRef in a GPS IFD, but InteropIndex in an Interoperability IFD.

    The registry also implements "Main Chain" normalisation, mapping all sequential Image File Directories (IFD0, IFD1, etc.) to the IFD_ROOT_DIRECTORY bucket for baseline and extension tag resolution.

    Version:
    1.1
    Author:
    Trevor Maggs

      • LOGGER

        public TagRegistry()

    • Method Detail

      • register

        private static void register(Taggable[] tags)
        Registers an array of Taggable constants into the global registry.

        Maps each tag to its respective directory-specific map based on the associated DirectoryIdentifier.

        Parameters:
        tags - the array of tags to register

      • resolve

        public static Taggable resolve(int id,
                               DirectoryIdentifier directory)
        Resolves a numerical tag ID to its corresponding Taggable definition within the context of a specific directory.

        If the specified directory is part of the Main Chain (IFD0-IFD3), the lookup is automatically redirected to use IFD_ROOT_DIRECTORY definitions.

        Parameters:
        id - the unsigned 16-bit Tag ID read from the TIFF structure
        directory - the directory context (IFD) where the tag was encountered
        Returns:
        the associated Taggable constant, otherwise a TagIFD_Unknown instance representing the undefined tag
